subcodes.first_line: O thou who art intoxicated with the wine of divine knowledge and illumined by the lights of guidance from the All-Merciful Lord, although until now the correspondence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مخمور صهبای عرفان و منور بانوار هدایت حضرت رحمن اگر چه تا بحال فتح مکاتبه
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @knowledge; recognition of God
